ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "required_date" TEXT /* Date the order is required */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* Shipping city */,
  "ship_region" TEXT /* Shipping region */,
  "ship_postal_code" TEXT /* Shipping postal code */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Shipping country */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Employee who handled the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount for the order including tax and shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer first made a purchase */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program record for the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Promotion applied to the product */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the product */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the product */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_details_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "quantity_per_unit" TEXT /* Quantity per unit of the product */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "units_in_stock" INTEGER /* Number of units in stock */,
  "units_on_order" INTEGER /* Number of units on order */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "discontinued" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is discontinued */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Path to an image of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "supplier_contact" TEXT /* Contact person for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the supplier */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_since" TEXT /* Date the supplier started doing business with the company */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order from the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Path to an image representing the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the warehouse */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the warehouse */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the warehouse */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "minimum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for the product in the warehouse */,
  "maximum_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level for the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Carrier used for the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment (e.g., in transit, delivered) */,
  "shipment_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the shipment */,
  "shipment_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the shipment */,
  "shipment_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or position of the employee */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the employee */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the employee */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the employee */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the employee */,
  "home_phone" TEXT /* Home phone number of the employee */,
  "extension" TEXT /* Extension number for the employee */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Photo of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Manager of the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Code for the reason of the return */,
  "return_cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_image" TEXT /* Path to an image representing the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points earned */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level of the customer */,
  "points_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the loyalty points expire */,
  "last_points_earned_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer last earned points */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_programs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales value */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the sales were made */,
  "sales_region" TEXT /* Region where the sales were made */,
  "sales_representative_id" INTEGER /* Sales representative who made the sales */,
  "sales_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_representative_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
